name: master-lab-api
description: Ephemeral FFmpeg mastering API for Master Lab

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/ffmpeg.js && node --check src/assistant.js && node --check src/jobs.js && node --check src/sessions.js
scripts.smoke: node -e "import('./src/presets.js').then(({ PRESETS, buildMasterFilter }) => { for (const key of Object.keys(PRESETS)) buildMasterFilter(key); console.log('preset filters ok'); })"
scripts.test: npm run check && npm run smoke && npm run test:presets && npm run test:audio
